title: Babies evacuated from Iranian hospital damaged in US-Israeli strikes
fullText: NewsFeedFootage showed babies being evacuated from a hospital in Bushehr, Iran after the facility was damaged amid US-Israeli strikes. Staff and Iranian Red Crescent workers could be seen wheeling the infants needing specialised care from the neonatal unit to waiting ambulances.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: Footage showed babies being evacuated from a hospital in Bushehr, Iran damaged by US-Israeli strikes.
